_comment: Encore CLI deploy workflow fixture. Fully verified with real Encore Cloud account output.

expected.exists: git remote get-url encore returns encore://<app-id>

verified_workflow.note: If clean, skip commit; if dirty, git add -A && git commit -m 'geppetto deploy <run_id>'

verified_workflow.verified_stdout:
remote: main: triggered deploy https://app.encore.cloud/rest-api-starter-i472/envs/staging/deploys/1ub2qo6agipb70en00a0
To encore://rest-api-starter-i472
   6507e7d..d002019  main -> main

verified_workflow.verified_rule: Parse triggered deploy URL, take the last path segment
MVP uses the deploy URL from push stdout as service_url
verified_workflow.future_enhancement: May be extended to query public API endpoint via Encore Cloud API

known_limitations.encore_app_info: Command does not exist as direct info query (verified)
known_limitations.encore_app_link: Does NOT automatically inject git remote (verified)
